text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Goodness, you'd like me to perform on stage?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm organizing an opera show, you see, for the
upcoming children's fan event.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I would like you to play the supporting role
of the princess.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The princess? How lovely. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any experience in theater, though. Is
that all right?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My eyes do not deceive me. You exude elegance
with your delicate temperament. To a child, you
would appear the quintessential princess.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Besides, with me as the script writer, director, and
leading actor, the opera's overwhelming success
is all but guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aah, what a fortunate and blessed being you are
to have been chosen by the Overlord to make
your operatic debut as a heroine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...And that's what she said when she invited me
for the role. I was thinking of taking up the
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Why not? It's a good idea. Having more
experience on stage would benefit you in your
winning concerts too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll come watch. I can help you rehearse your lines
if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Would you really? I could tackle anything with
you at my side, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to practice hard so I can bring smiles to
all the children. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I walk past the outdoor stage and see
some kind of show being held for families who
live around the neighborhood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Grandmother! Never would I have believed
you were a witch. ♪

text_block_list.name: Witch
text_block_list.text:
Pesky princess! A curse on you I shall cast! ♪
Sleep now, and slumber forevermore! ♪

text_block_list.name: Witch
text_block_list.text: Take this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh dearie me. My body feels so weak, and I'm
so... very... sleepy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Goood... niiight... Zzzz... Zzzz... ♪

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Princess, wake up!
The witch is so mean!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aah! I have come too late. ♪ Princess! What has
befallen you?! I will not let this act go
unpunished! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I recall the day when we both met! 'Twas when I
had just gained awareness of the world 'round
me. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Since I was a child, I've always been a beautiful,
handsome prince! And I stole the eyes of every
lady in the palace. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Opera O's lines are so long. But the kids seem
really into it, so I guess that's good.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Bright's doing fantastic up there too. She doesn't
seem nervous at all. She might be a natural at
this.)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And now, I will smite the evil witch and bring
peace back to the world! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Young friends! In order to awaken the princess, I
require your help! Lend me your voices! All at
once now! Let us wake the princess!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Princeeeess... Wake uuup...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(The kids seem a little shy. I guess it does take a
lot of courage to yell out loud all of a sudden...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Not that it matters. Bright should open her eyes
soon, and then the story will end happily ever...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Um... Wait a minute. This wasn't in the script.
What's Bright doing?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Is she actually asleep?! You have got to be kidding... This is bad!)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Proud friends! Tiny heroes! Is that all the power
you've got?! Come now! Show the princess what
you're truly made of!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Princess! Please! You have to wake up!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That's the spirit! The fate of the princess
depends on the power of your voices!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: We have to try harder! Princeeesss! Waaake uuup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by T.M. Opera O, more children
begin to join in and start yelling, until...

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: PRINCEEEESS!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn. That was a nice nap.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay! The princess woke up!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Young heroes! The power within each and
every one of you has awoken the princess from
her deep slumber!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: We did it! We did it! Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The children smile and cheer together, feeling a
deep sense of unity thanks to the show, and the
opera finishes on a high note.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you actually fell asleep on stage... I
was so scared the show would be ruined.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I accidentally stayed up too late
reviewing the script yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, Bright... Only you could still make it work
out somehow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What a brilliant performance that was! What a
marvelous eye I have for talent, to have found
such a diamond in the rough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My! ♪ It's really an honor to receive so much
praise.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I particularly loved how you improvised toward
the end and ignored the children's cries in order
to draw them further into the performance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You breathed life into the stage, resulting in an
outstanding finale!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've decided! Bright, you must be a part of the
next work I perform at my family's residence!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Are you offering me another role? If you'll
have me, I would love to come. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O continues to shower Mejiro Bright
in praise, unaware that her artistic choice was
nothing more than a timely blunder.
